concept: Compassion / An Open Connection of Care
description: The deep wish for all beings to be free from suffering, coupled with the active commitment to help ease that suffering. It is the active expression of empathy.
rationale: A composition of the roots 'lo' (connection) and 'thea' (active, tender care). The word's structure suggests 'a connection of active care,' defining compassion as a proactive, open-hearted engagement with the suffering of others.
